title: 100pc Universal Rotary Accessory Kit Abrasive Stone Tools
description:
The Universal Rotary Tool Abrasive Precision Tip Accessory Set includes 100 assorted abrasive bits for detailed work on your home craft and hobby DIY project. The bits have 10 different shapes including Rods, Cones, Flat Wheels, Rounded tips all in a variety of grits from coarse to fine. Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision; literally a unique bit for every job imaginable. For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, and more. These bits will fit any standard rotary tool with a 1/8th shaft including all dremel models.

100pc Universal Rotary Accessory Kit Abrasive Stone Tools

The Universal Rotary Tool Abrasive Precision Tip Accessory Set includes 100 assorted abrasive bits for detailed work on your home craft and hobby DIY project. The bits have 10 different shapes including Rods, Cones, Flat Wheels, Rounded tips all in a variety of grits from coarse to fine.

Key Features

  • NO FANCY PACKAGING - This is a premium bulk buy with no hidden costs, no added claim shell packaging. Everything you need in a protective foam case.
  • JUST THE TIPS: (10) Different shaped abrasive grinder bits from coarse to fine grit with a 1/8 inch shaft for use with all rotary tool kits
  • Grits Vary From Fine to Coarse
  • 1/8 inch Shank | Universal Fit | All Standard Rotary Tools

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 100ROTARY
  • UPC: 706569868722
  • Color: Pink and Grey
  • Size: Multi-Color
